name: ice-propose
description: iCE Consulting proprietary theme for B2B enterprise sales proposals, methodology decks, solution architecture, project roadmaps, and TOR-compliance documents. Premium-enterprise-advisor mood with a soft edge — confident, calm, technical without being aggressive. Cool palette built on iCE Blue and iCE Cyan, with glass/metallic 3D infographic style and bilingual Thai+English hierarchy. Use when the customer is iCE Consulting itself, when the user requests iCE-branded output, or when the deck must follow iCE Corporate Identity. Pairs cleanly with Oracle, NetSuite, SAP, and Microsoft vendor accents because the core palette is cool-neutral.

layoutPatterns.patternA: two-column-split — Core Principles 45% + Visualization 55% + bottom Toolset gallery
layoutPatterns.patternB: horizontal-tech-flow — Source Systems → Connector → Destination Cloud → Outputs
layoutPatterns.patternC: phase-grid-3x2 — 6 phase cards with check-icon bullets and top banner
layoutPatterns.patternD: timeline-swimlane — milestone diamonds + horizontal RACI bars + bottom phase axis

infographicStyle.iconStyle: isometric-3D, glass-metallic, 15-25deg tilt, soft drop shadow 15-25% opacity
infographicStyle.diamondMarker: isometric cube, 1.5-2x larger than icon, used for phase boundary
infographicStyle.cardStyle: white fill, 8px radius, #A8C7E0 border 1px, no shadow
infographicStyle.connectorStyle: 2px stroke #41A8B5 solid arrow OR gradient pipe for secure connection

antiPatterns: no colors outside palette (purple, orange, pink) in main content
no mixing flat and 3D icons in same slide
no heavy shadows or saturated gradients
Thai title must not be larger than English title
no plain black bullets — use cyan check icon
no navy full-page background in content slides
no logo in both corners on same slide
source: Distilled from 6 real iCE Consulting deliverables + iCE Corporate Identity Guideline
